title: 'Jann' people list — Aug 24 2021 (souvenirs?)
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note from Aug 24, 2021 (Yahir age 18, four days pre-Peru) titled "-Jann" — vertical name list: Emilio / Mom / Dad / Valeria / DVAID / Kylie / Charlee / KAI / Cab. Read as a souvenirs / who-I'm-bringing-something-back-for list, paired with the Aug 21 packing list and Aug 31 in country list.
  • Names a wider family circle than any prior 2021 note. Confirmed entities: emilio, Mom, Dad, valeria, jann (the title is the addressee or the headline gift), kai. New first-name-only candidates: DVAID (a David, queued; voice-to-text spelling), Kylie, Charlee. Cab is ambiguous — could be a person's name or a literal "cab" reminder.
  • The title Jann with no surname suggests this is the same Jann who recurs through the debt of gratitude / renaissance scholarship orbit — Yahir is treating her with the same gift-bringing courtesy as immediate family, which is itself a graph signal about her status in his world.
  • Read the Emilio → Mom → Dad → Valeria opening as the canonical nuclear family ordering — the same sequence appears in later gift / message-list notes. The drop from family to DVAID / Kylie / Charlee / KAI signals an extended-family or close-cousin tier.
  • Strategic note for the wider graph: this is one of the cleanest who matters to Yahir at 18 enumerations in the corpus. Useful for brain ask questions about who was in Yahir's circle on the eve of Peru.

Key list (verbatim)

Emilio · Mom · Dad · Valeria · DVAID · Kylie · Charlee · KAI · Cab

Why it matters in the graph

  • Confirms jann's gift-list status alongside immediate family — densifies her relationship arc.
  • Establishes the Aug 21 → Aug 24 → Aug 31 triplet as a coherent Peru-prep micro-cluster.

Stub note

  • DVAID (likely David), Kylie, Charlee, Cab — first-name-only single-mentions. Queued to Potential Entities on log.md rather than stubbed; promote on disambiguated second mention.

Privacy

  • First-name-only references retained as in raw. No surnames, no contact info, no PII.

Wikilinks

jann · emilio · valeria · mom yahir · dad yahir · kai · yahir family · peru prep 2021 · 2021 08 21 pre peru packing list
